title: glandularia porrigens
intro: Glandularia porrigens, also known as Rock Rose, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Glandularia porrigens include wound healing, relief from skin irritations, and potentially reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
